quality.rationale: 基于局部平坦坐标的多步协变导数展开，清晰建立标量场高阶导数对易子与黎曼曲率张量的解析关系，理论深度适中且完全自洽。

origin.question: [文件 1: 1_s9_9.9.md]\n\nProblem 9.9. Show that the second derivatives of a scalar field commute (i.e. show that $\mathbf {S}_{; a \beta} = \mathbf {S}_{; b \alpha}$ ). For third derivatives $\mathbf {S}_{; a \beta \gamma}$ , compute $\mathbf {S}_{; ( a \beta ) \gamma}$ and $\mathbf {S}_{; a [ \beta \gamma ]}$ .
origin.solution:
Solution 9.9. The second derivates of a scalar are
$$
\mathbf {S}_{; a  eta} = (\mathbf {S}_{, a})_{;  eta} = \mathbf {S}_{, a  eta} - \mathbf {S}_{, \sigma} \Gamma_{a  eta}^{\sigma}.
$$
This expression is obviously symmetric in $\alpha$ and $ eta$ .
To investigate third derivatives use local flat coordinates as in Problem 9.8. We have then
$$
\mathsf {S}_{; a  eta \gamma} = (\mathsf {S}_{, a  eta} - \mathsf {S}_{\sigma} \Gamma_{a  eta}^{\sigma})_{, \gamma} = \mathsf {S}_{, a  eta \gamma} - \mathsf {S}_{\sigma} \mathsf {I}_{a  eta , \gamma}^{\sigma} = \mathsf {S}_{; (a  eta) \gamma}.
$$
From this expression and from the result of Problem 9.8 we also have
$$
\mathsf {S}_{; \alpha [ \beta \gamma ]} = \frac {1}{2} \mathsf {S}_{; \sigma} \mathsf {R}_{\alpha \beta \gamma}^{\sigma}.
$$
